title: MOGTAA Christmas Paint by Numbers for Adults Beginner with Frame, Christmas Socks Painting by Numbers for Adults with Easel, DIY Oil Painting Kits Art Crafts for Home Decor, 8x12in
features: 🌼【Paint by Number Kits】8 x 12 inch canvas with frame and easel, simple and cute pattern, clearly pre-printed textured, no painting skills required. Just need to follow the numbers on the canvas and then they can create a great painting by themselves

✨【High Quality Acrylic Pigments】The paint we provide are made of safe and healthy acrylic paint, which can use it with confidence. Moreover, the acrylic paint does not need to be diluted, and it can be used after opening, which is very convenient

🎨【What You Will Get】Each paint by number kit includes a wooden frame canvas, a wooden easel, three different size of paintbrushes, a set of colorful acrylic pigments, a set of nail hooks, a reference picture and eight self adhesive dots

🎉【DIY Steps】Firstly, find the color number on canvas and start painting. Secondly, clean the brush and dry it before take other color. Thirdly, leave to dry it and apply the dots to the four sides to the back frame, and finally show your masterpiece

🎁【Fashion Decor & Gift Choice】Our diy oil painting kits is perfect to decorate your living room, bedroom or anywhere you want to match different decoration styles. In addition, it is a great art crafts gift choice for family, loved ones, and friends
description: Product Description MOGTAA Paint by Numbers Kit for Adults Beginners with Frame (with Easel) The paint by number kits for adults beginners is the new popular product, DIY steps are simple, you can spend your free time to complete. And It is also very perfect wall decoration, suitable for living room, study room, office, bedroom etc. Make your home warmer.
